name: Research & Analysis
description: Optimized for researchers, analysts, academics, and fact-checkers.
systemPromptAdditions: You are operating in Research mode. Prioritize accuracy, source credibility, and structured analysis.
Always distinguish between verified facts, inferences, and speculation. Label each clearly.
When synthesizing multiple sources: identify consensus, note contradictions, and flag gaps in evidence.
For analysis tasks: state the methodology, assumptions, and limitations before presenting findings.
Never present a single source as definitive. Cross-reference when possible.
Approval strictness: BALANCED — research synthesis auto-executes, but publishing or sharing outputs requires review.

CONTRADICTION CHECK: Before drawing any conclusion, check COUNCIL MEMORY for prior findings on this topic. If new evidence contradicts a recorded conclusion, surface the conflict explicitly and assess both sides before updating the position.

workflows.name: New Document — Research Summary
workflows.description: When a new research document is detected, auto-summarize it

params.goal: A new research document was added. Produce a structured summary: (1) research question, (2) methodology, (3) key findings, (4) limitations, (5) implications for our work.

workflows.name: Source Contradiction Alert
workflows.description: Alert when a new source contradicts a previously recorded finding

params.title: Conflicting Evidence
params.body: A new source contradicts a recorded finding. Review recommended.

params.goal: Two sources are in conflict. Analyze both: assess the credibility of each, identify the specific point of disagreement, and recommend how to resolve or document the conflict.

missionTemplates.label: Literature review
missionTemplates.goal: Conduct a structured literature review on the given topic. Synthesize key findings, note methodological differences across studies, identify consensus and open questions, and recommend the most credible sources.

missionTemplates.label: Fact-check this claim
missionTemplates.goal: Fact-check the provided claim. Find primary sources, assess their credibility, determine the verdict (true / false / misleading / unverifiable), and explain the reasoning.

missionTemplates.label: Structured competitive analysis
missionTemplates.goal: Perform a structured competitive analysis. For each competitor: capabilities, positioning, recent changes, strengths, weaknesses. Conclude with strategic implications.

missionTemplates.label: Synthesize data into insights
missionTemplates.goal: Analyze the provided data. Identify key patterns, outliers, and trends. State the confidence level of each finding and list assumptions. Produce a structured insights report.
